offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed renegotiation opportunities cause increased costs. We provide a contract management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract terms and identifying renegotiation opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Amazon sellers seek advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about contract management
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with a demo video
Participate in forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try Store agreements securely and Monitor contract terms on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
